items.title: 🎯 The Amex 50% Points-Back Offer – Explained Amex will give you up to 50% points back if you redeem your Membership Rewards points for: 👉 Settling statement dues (You can settle your entire statement dues, including card fee, using points) 👉 Pay with Points for your online and offline spends (Amex cardholders get the option on payment pages/swipe machines to make payments using points while using their Amex cards) 💡 For both statement settlement and retail shopping payments, the redemption value is: ➡️ 1 Amex Point = ₹0.25 📅 Offer Period: 18th June to 18th July (both dates inclusive) 📧 The 50% Points-Back Offer is applicable only if you have received the offer email from Amex. ✅ If you received the email, all your active Amex cards are eligible for the offer, including Credit Cards, Charge Cards, and even newly approved Amex cards. 📌 No separate email is sent for each card. If you received the offer email, it applies across your eligible Amex cards (see chat screenshot 👇). ⚠️ Your cards must remain active until the bonus points are credited by Amex. 📊 Depending on the total number of points redeemed during the offer period, the points-back rate will be determined. 🔄 Multiple shopping transactions and statement settlement transactions will be considered collectively to calculate the applicable points-back rate. At the time of redemption, you receive 1 Point = ₹0.25 value. Later, Amex refunds a portion of the redeemed points as follows: 🔹 30,000 – 69,999 points redeemed ➡️ 30% points refunded ➡️ Effective value = ₹0.36 per point 🔹 70,000 – 99,999 points redeemed ➡️ 40% points refunded ➡️ Effective value = ₹0.42 per point 🔹 1,00,000 – 2,00,000 points redeemed ➡️ 50% points refunded ➡️ Effective value = ₹0.50 per point 🔹 Any redemption beyond 2 lakh points will not earn additional bonus points, as the maximum points-back is capped at 1 lakh points. 📌 Total points redeemed and the 1 lakh points-back cap are both calculated at the customer level, not the card level. So, points redeemed across all your Amex cards will be combined to determine the applicable points-back rate, and the 1 lakh points-back limit is also shared across all cards. 🤔 My Take on the Offer People generally take Amex cards to redeem points for ✈️ flights and 🏨 luxury hotel stays. The most conservative value that users usually assign to Membership Rewards points for flight and hotel redemptions is around: ➡️ 1 Point = ₹0.50 Ironically, that’s also the maximum value you can achieve under this offer. So, if you are planning to redeem 1 lakh+ points, then this is a decent offer as you effectively get ₹0.50 per point. But, as I mentioned, this is also a very conservative value of Amex points. Flight/Hotel redemptions can easily give much better value. Most strategic card users will avoid this offer completely. If you are redeeming Amex points at a lower value than this, it may indicate that you probably chose the wrong credit card for your lifestyle and spending patterns. 💳 You would likely have received much better value on your spends with a good cashback credit card such as the SBI Cashback Credit Card or the Kiwi Credit Card. 📘 Visit SpendWisely Blog: Detailed credit card reviews & guides 👉 https://spendwisely.in Some links may be referral links in the above post. It supports the page without any cost to you. #creditcard #spendwisely #creditcard
